title: Cummins Inc. 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for segment structure, business description, risks, revenue, profitability, and Accelera disclosures.

title: Cummins Reports Strong Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
note: Provides 2025 revenue, net income, EBITDA margin, 2026 outlook, and electrolyzer-business charges.

title: Cummins Market Cap and Stock Overview
note: Late-May 2026 market capitalization reference for Cummins.

title: Cummins P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio reference for Cummins as of May 2026.

title: LifeTrac
note: Documents an open-source tractor concept using modular detachable PowerCube units.

title: Power Cube v17.11
note: Open documentation for a modular power-unit concept relevant to decentralized machinery repair and fabrication.

title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management platform for storage, renewables, EV charging, heat pumps, electrolyzers, tariffs, and related assets.

title: OpenEMS
note: Project overview and governance context for the OpenEMS energy management ecosystem.

title: Open Charge Point Protocol
note: Defines OCPP as an open protocol for communication between EV charge points and central systems.

title: OpenOCPP
note: Open-source embedded OCPP software stack for EV charger manufacturers.

title: NREL 25-cm2 High-Pressure Low-Temperature Electrolysis Cell Hardware (Open Source)
note: Open-source electrolysis hardware reference useful for evaluating what parts of hydrogen systems can be documented and replicated openly.
